# ADR-XXX: Title

## Status

Proposed, Accepted, Superseded, or Rejected.

## Context

Describe the decision pressure, alternatives, and constraints.

## Decision

State the decision clearly.

## Consequences

List the direct tradeoffs, follow-on requirements, and risks created by the decision.

## Open Decisions

If anything remains unresolved, record recommendation, rationale, and what would change the decision.
